title: Mappings, Sets, and Nested Data · Language Clinic: Python Dict Views Iteration
summary: Index community resources, remove duplicates, compare inventories, and merge changed records. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python dict views iteration increment in a deduplicated resource inventory. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Iterate keys, values, and item views while preserving insertion order and avoiding size changes during iteration.
Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
